create_radio.ponder.astronautical_radio_: Astronautical Radio Links are the highest radio tier.
They can bridge dimensions and provide the strongest radio peripheral behavior.
CC:Tweaked example: find the radio peripheral.
create_radio.ponder.brass_radio_link.tex: Brass Radio Links are long-range redstone links.
Set one link to Sender and the other to Receiver, then give both the same frequency.
The receiver outputs the latest redstone strength sent on that frequency.
create_radio.ponder.ground_base.text_0: Build the Ground Base from separate heavy antenna parts.
create_radio.ponder.ground_base.text_1: It receives every frequency at once and can transmit on any channel.
create_radio.ponder.ground_base.text_2: If any required antenna part is missing, the peripheral stops receiving events.
create_radio.ponder.radio_antennas.text_: Radio antennas let computers exchange packets on named frequencies.
Andesite reaches 2000 blocks. Copper reaches 5000 blocks.
Brass antennas have infinite same-dimension range.
CC:Tweaked example: find the radio peripheral.
create_radio.ponder.scramblers.text_0: Scramblers interfere with one configured frequency.
create_radio.ponder.scramblers.text_1: Copper covers 100 blocks. Brass covers 1000 blocks.
create_radio.ponder.scramblers.text_2: Computer packets are scrambled. Redstone radio links on that frequency are blocked.
